Our Story

Making Vietnamese
herbal tea global.

TENLeaf Tea was born from a simple belief: the ancient wellness wisdom of Vietnam deserves a global stage. For centuries, Vietnamese families have brewed artichoke tea for its remarkable health properties — we're here to bring that tradition to health-conscious Americans.

We work directly with family-run farms in the highlands of Dalat, Vietnam — a region renowned for its cool climate and exceptional artichoke cultivation. Every bag is packed with whole dried flowers, nothing else.

Our mission is to make Vietnamese herbal tea the next great wellness movement — just as matcha transformed tea culture, we believe artichoke tea will be your next daily ritual.

Direct from Vietnam. We partner with highland farmers to source the finest artichoke flowers at peak harvest.

Zero compromise. No additives, fillers, or artificial flavors — ever. Just pure, whole-flower herbal tea.

Community-driven. Every purchase supports sustainable farming families in Dalat, Vietnam.

Health Benefits Guide

The science behind
artichoke tea.

Vietnamese artichoke tea has been used in traditional herbal medicine for generations. Here's what makes it extraordinary.

01
Liver Detox & Cleanse

Cynarin and silymarin compounds in artichoke flower are known to stimulate bile production, helping your liver more efficiently process and eliminate toxins. Traditional Vietnamese medicine has used this property for centuries to support liver health after heavy meals or periods of indulgence.

02
Digestive Support

Artichoke tea promotes healthy gut bacteria and stimulates digestive enzymes. Studies suggest regular consumption may reduce bloating, ease IBS symptoms, and improve overall gut motility — making it ideal as a post-meal ritual or morning starter.

03
Better Sleep Quality

As a naturally caffeine-free herbal infusion, artichoke tea creates the perfect winding-down ritual. The calming floral flavor and mild adaptogenic properties help reduce cortisol levels, creating the mental quiet needed for deep, restorative sleep.

04
Antioxidants & Metabolism

Rich in polyphenols and flavonoids, artichoke flower tea delivers potent antioxidant protection. These compounds help combat oxidative stress, support healthy cholesterol levels, and may contribute to improved metabolic function over consistent use.

How to brew your
perfect cup.

💧
Step 1
Heat Water

Bring water to 185°F (85°C) — not boiling. This preserves delicate floral compounds.

🍵
Step 2
Steep

Place one bag in your cup. Pour water over and steep for 5–7 minutes.

🌿
Step 3
Enhance

Add a touch of honey or lemon to complement the natural floral notes.

✨
Step 4
Enjoy

Sip slowly. Best enjoyed morning or evening as a calming wellness ritual.

FAQ

Questions &
answers.

What does artichoke tea taste like? +
Artichoke tea has a delicate, floral flavor with subtle earthy undertones. It's naturally slightly sweet and very calming — nothing like what you might expect from artichoke the vegetable. Most customers describe it as smooth, gentle, and beautifully aromatic.
Is TENLeaf artichoke tea caffeine-free? +
Yes, 100%. Artichoke is an herbal infusion, not a true tea, so it contains zero caffeine naturally. This makes it perfect for morning wellness rituals and especially for winding down before bed.
How often should I drink it to see benefits? +
We recommend 1–2 cups daily for best results. Many customers notice improved digestion within 1–2 weeks of consistent use. Liver and detox benefits are typically felt within 2–4 weeks. Like all wellness practices, consistency is key.
Where exactly is the tea sourced from? +
All our artichoke flowers are sourced exclusively from Dalat (Đà Lạt), Vietnam — a highland city at 1,500 meters elevation known for its cool, misty climate and centuries of artichoke cultivation. We work with family farms who follow sustainable growing practices.
Are there any additives or artificial ingredients? +
Never. TENLeaf teas contain only whole dried artichoke flowers — that's it. No additives, preservatives, artificial flavors, sweeteners, or fillers of any kind. We believe in letting nature speak for itself.
What is your shipping and return policy? +
We offer free standard shipping on US orders over $40. Orders typically ship within 1–2 business days and arrive in 3–7 days. If you're not satisfied for any reason, we offer a 30-day satisfaction guarantee — just reach out and we'll make it right.
How does the subscription work? +
Our monthly subscription saves you 20% on every order. You'll receive your tea automatically each month with no hassle. You can pause, skip, or cancel anytime through your account — no lock-in, no penalties. It's the easiest way to keep your wellness ritual going.
